summary: Renter Portal Phase 1.2 testing complete. All features working: Auth flow with redirect, Dashboard with TanStack Query, My Bookings page with 4 tabs (All, Upcoming, Past, Cancelled), Bookings API with renterId filter, no hardcoded 'renter-1' references. Backend 9/9 tests passed, Frontend UI working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: No 'renter-1' hardcoded references found in codebase (grep returned empty)
VERIFIED: /renter/layout.js implements proper auth check with localStorage session validation
VERIFIED: /renter/bookings/page.js uses TanStack Query with dynamic userId from localStorage
VERIFIED: /api/v2/bookings?renterId={id} endpoint returns correct empty array for users with no bookings
VERIFIED: Messages page (/renter/messages/[id]/page.js) uses dynamic renterId from localStorage
NOTE: /dashboard/renter does NOT use the same auth-protected layout as /renter/* pages - this is intentional as it's a separate entry point
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - test users have no bookings (expected behavior)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Renter Portal Phase 1.2 fully tested. Auth flow, Dashboard, My Bookings page with filters all working. Users have no bookings currently - empty states display correctly. TanStack Query integration verified. Messages page uses dynamic userId. No hardcoded 'renter-1' found.

auth_flow.evidence: Accessing /renter/bookings without login shows 'Требуется авторизация' message with 'Войти' button linking to /profile?login=true

dashboard_stats.evidence: Dashboard shows 4 stat cards (Total Bookings, Active Trips, Pending, Completed) all showing 0 for user with no bookings

my_bookings_tabs.evidence: My Bookings page shows 4 tabs: Все (All), Предстоящие (Upcoming), Прошедшие (Past), Отменённые (Cancelled)

empty_states.evidence: Empty state shows 'Нет бронирований' with CTA button 'Найти жильё'

dynamic_userid_messages.evidence: Messages page uses localStorage.getItem('gostaylo_user') to get userId dynamically

tanstack_query.evidence: Dashboard and My Bookings pages use useQuery from @tanstack/react-query with proper staleTime and caching

test_classes: TestRenterBookingsAPI - 3 tests (pavel user bookings, partner as renter, no renterId)

pages_tested: /dashboard/renter - Dashboard with stats and quick actions
